description: Create en/msp/dispatch.json with ~120 keys following naming convention

TechnicianDispatchDashboard.tsx: translate error/success toasts, permission messages, filter options, private event title
ScheduleEvent.tsx + WeeklyScheduleEvent.tsx: translate View Details, Delete, Busy, Unknown/Unassigned/Untitled fallbacks

WorkItemCard.tsx: translate Needs Dispatch badge and tooltip
TimeHeader.tsx: translate AM/PM time suffixes
DailyTechnicianScheduleGrid.tsx: translate View Week tooltip and aria-labels
Update ROUTE_NAMESPACES for /msp/technician-dispatch to load msp/dispatch
Generate dispatch translations for all 6 non-English locales (fr, es, de, nl, it, pl)
Create dispatch pseudo-locale files (xx, yy)
Italian accent audit on it/msp/dispatch.json

Create en/msp/time-entry.json with ~161 keys following naming convention

TimeSheetHeader.tsx: translate status badges, heading template with interpolation, navigation labels, submit/reopen buttons, pagination
